entities.name: BRUCHIDS
entities.description: Major storage pests of legume crops including pigeonpea that cause economic losses

entities.name: LEGUME CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown in the tropics and sub-tropics

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.) susceptible to bruchid attack

entities.name: SOLAR HEATING
entities.description: A low-cost method using transparent polyethylene bags to control bruchid damage in seeds

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The ability of seeds to sprout, which remained unaffected by solar heating

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL AND HUMID TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Regions where farmers may consider using solar heating for seed disinfestation

entities.name: STORAGE
entities.description: The period during which seeds are kept and are vulnerable to bruchid attack

relationships.description: is used to disinfest seeds of

relationships.target: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL AND HUMID TROPICAL REGIONS
